name: Headphone Stand Flower - heyday™
description:
The Headphone Stand Flower from heyday™ is a practical accessory designed to keep your headphones organized. Standing at 11.97 inches tall, it provides a stable base for your headphones with a width of 4.54 inches and a depth of 4.54 inches. Lightweight, this multicolored stand adds a playful touch to your desk or entertainment area. The compact design ensures it fits easily into various spaces, making it a functional addition to your setup.

heyday™: Let your style speak volumes.
